name: VaultFront
currentFocus: Session 68 complete: operatorNext playtest scripts, Rival Challenge conversion visibility in the KPI tile, and S68 audit/implementation truth-sync shipped.
nextMilestone: Run the operatorNext-guided rivalry/rematch alpha gate, inspect Rival Challenge action rate in the KPI tile, and observe real checkout/supporter telemetry before clearing the revenue warning.
entropyMethod: coherence-variance + decision-reversal count + intent-drift; all three at minimum — no off-axis features, 0 decision reversals in 5 sessions, 100% intent achievement, SIL coherence 100/100
